positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric arrangement featuring a majestic, neon-lit ouroboros serpent intertwined with stylized lunar cycles and minimalist forest foliage. The design should have a clean, bold silhouette suitable for print. Use a vibrant palette of deep indigo, glowing cyan, rich gold, and emerald green. High contrast vector art style, reminiscent of psychedelic Art Nouveau meets modern graphic design. Centered composition, isolated on a clean white background, suitable for screen printing on clothing. Perfect symmetry, thick linework, illustrative, graphic novel style, high detail, vibrant colors.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, grain, smudge, photorealism, bokeh
